I believe these are all of the strict MV3 scales with twelve notes. Unconditional MV3 scales may have any L:M:s ratio. Conditional MV3 scales have a condition specified in the section header that the L:M:s ratio needs to satisfy in order for the scale to be strict MV3. Lines with two scales separated with a slash are lexicographically left and right chiral scales respectively, lines with only one scale are therefore achiral. All scales are written in their brightest mode. Scales are grouped into sisterhoods. Unconditional sisterhoods may have up to six scales while conditional sisterhoods appear to have up to two scales. The two scales in conditional sisterhoods have their L's and s's swapped.


'''Here's some stats:'''

521 Scales Total

9 Unconditional Single-Period

491 Conditional Single-Period

5 Unconditional Multi-Period

16 Conditional Multi-Period


== Unconditional ==

=== <u>Single-Period</u> ===

'''4L 4M 4s:'''
LMLsMsLMsLMs / LMLsMLsMLsMs

'''4L 4M 4s:'''
LMsLsMLsMLsM / LMsLMsLMsLsM

'''4L 4M 4s:'''
LMsMLsMLsMLs / LMsLMsLMsMLs


'''4L 4M 4s:'''
LMLsMLsMsLMs

'''4L 4M 4s:'''
LMsLMsLsMLsM

'''4L 4M 4s:'''
LMsLMsMLsMLs


=== <u>Multi-Period</u> ===

'''4L 4M 4s:'''
LsMLsMLsMLsM / LMsLMsLMsLMs


'''4L 4M 4s:'''
LMLsMsLMLsMs

'''4L 4M 4s:'''
LMsLsMLMsLsM

'''4L 4M 4s:'''
LMsMLsLMsMLs


== Conditional (MM=Ls) ==

=== <u>Single-Period</u> ===

'''9L 2M 1s:''' LLLLsLLLMLLM

'''1L 2M 9s:''' LsssMssMssss



'''9L 2M 1s:''' LLLLMLLMLLLs

'''1L 2M 9s:''' LssssMssMsss



'''9L 2M 1s:''' LLLLLsLLLLMM

'''1L 2M 9s:''' LssssMMsssss



'''9L 2M 1s:''' LLLLLMMLLLLs

'''1L 2M 9s:''' LsssssMMssss



'''3L 8M 1s:''' LMMLsMMLMMMM

'''1L 8M 3s:''' LMMsMMMMsMMs



'''3L 8M 1s:''' LMMLMsMLMMMM

'''1L 8M 3s:''' LMsMMMMsMMsM



'''3L 8M 1s:''' LMMLMMsLMMMM

'''1L 8M 3s:''' LsMMMMsMMsMM



'''3L 8M 1s:''' LMMLMMMMLsMM

'''1L 8M 3s:''' LMMsMMsMMMMs



'''3L 8M 1s:''' LMMLMMMMLMsM

'''1L 8M 3s:''' LMsMMsMMMMsM



'''3L 8M 1s:''' LMMLMMMMLMMs

'''1L 8M 3s:''' LsMMsMMMMsMM



'''3L 8M 1s:''' LMLsMLMMMMMM

'''1L 8M 3s:''' LMsMMMMMMsMs



'''3L 8M 1s:''' LMLMsLMMMMMM

'''1L 8M 3s:''' LsMMMMMMsMsM



'''3L 8M 1s:''' LMLMMMMMMLsM

'''1L 8M 3s:''' LMsMsMMMMMMs



'''3L 8M 1s:''' LMLMMMMMMLMs

'''1L 8M 3s:''' LsMsMMMMMMsM



'''3L 8M 1s:''' LLsLMMMMMMMM

'''1L 8M 3s:''' LsMMMMMMMMss



'''3L 8M 1s:''' LLMMMMMMMMLs

'''1L 8M 3s:''' LssMMMMMMMMs



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMsMMLsMMM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMsMMMLMMs



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMsMLMMsMMM / LMMMsMMLMsMM


'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMsMMLMMsM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMsMMLMsMMM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMsMLMsMMM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMsMMMLMsM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMsMLMMsMM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMsMMMLMsMM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMsLMMsMMM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMsMMMLsMM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMsMMMLsMMM / LMMMsLMMMsMM


'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMsMMMLsM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMsLMsMMMM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMsMMMLMs

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMsMLsMMMM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMsLMMsMMMM / LMMMMsMMLsMM


'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMsMMLMsM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMsMLMsMMMM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMsMMLMMs

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMsMMLsMMMM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMsMLsMMM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMsMMMMLMs



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMsMLMsMM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMsMMMMLMsM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMsMMLMsMMMM / LMMMMsMLMMsM


'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMsMLMMMs

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMsMMMLsMMMM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMsLsMMMM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMsMMMMLs



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMsLMsMMM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMsMMMMLsM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMsLMMsMM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMsMMMMLsMM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMsLMMMsM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMsMMMMLsMMM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMMsMMMLs

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMsLsMMMMM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMMsMMLsM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMsLMsMMMMM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMMsMMLMs

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMsMLsMMMMM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMMsMLsMM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMsMMMMMLMs



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMsMLMsMMMMM / LMMMMMsMLMsM


'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMMsMLMMs

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMsMMLsMMMMM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMMsLsMMM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMsMMMMMLs



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMMsLMsMM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMsMMMMMLsM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMMsLMMsM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMsMMMMMLsMM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LsMMMLsMMMMM / LMMMMMsLMMMs


'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMMMsMMLs

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMsLsMMMMMM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMsLMsMMMMMM / LMMMMMMsMLsM


'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMMMsMLMs

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMsMLsMMMMMM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMMMsLsMM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMsMMMMMMLs



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMMMsLMsM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMsMMMMMMLsM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LsMMLsMMMMMM / LMMMMMMsLMMs


'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMMMMsMLs

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMsLsMMMMMMM



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMMMMsLsM

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMsMMMMMMMLs



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LsMLsMMMMMMM / LMMMMMMMsLMs


'''2L 8M 2s:''' LsLsMMMMMMMM / LMMMMMMMMsLs


'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMLsMMMMs



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMLsMMMMMs

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMMLsMMMs



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMLsMMMMMMs

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMMMLsMMs



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMLsMMMMMMMs

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMMMMLsMs



'''2L 8M 2s:''' LLsMMMMMMMMs

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMMMMMLss



'''8L 2M 2s:''' LLLsLLMLMLLs

'''2L 2M 8s:''' LssMsMssLsss



'''8L 2M 2s:''' LLLsLLLsLLMM

'''2L 2M 8s:''' LssMMsssLsss



'''8L 2M 2s:''' LLLMMLLsLLLs

'''2L 2M 8s:''' LsssLsssMMss



'''8L 2M 2s:''' LLLMMLLLsLLs

'''2L 2M 8s:''' LssLsssMMsss



'''8L 2M 2s:''' LLLLsLLMMLLs

'''2L 2M 8s:''' LssMMssLssss



'''7L 4M 1s:''' LLMLMLLsLMLM

'''1L 4M 7s:''' LsMsMssMsMss



'''7L 4M 1s:''' LLMLMLLMLsLM

'''1L 4M 7s:''' LsMssMsMssMs



'''7L 4M 1s:''' LLMLMLLMLMLs

'''1L 4M 7s:''' LssMsMssMsMs



'''7L 4M 1s:''' LLMLLsLMLLMM

'''1L 4M 7s:''' LsMssMMssMss



'''7L 4M 1s:''' LLMLLMMLLMLs

'''1L 4M 7s:''' LssMssMMssMs



'''7L 4M 1s:''' LLLsLLMMLLMM

'''1L 4M 7s:''' LssMMssMMsss



'''7L 4M 1s:''' LLLsLLMLMMLM

'''1L 4M 7s:''' LssMsMMsMsss



'''7L 4M 1s:''' LLLMMLMMLLLs

'''1L 4M 7s:''' LsssMMsMMsss



'''7L 4M 1s:''' LLLMMLLsLLMM

'''1L 4M 7s:''' LssMMsssMMss



'''7L 4M 1s:''' LLLMMLLMMLLs

'''1L 4M 7s:''' LsssMMssMMss



'''7L 4M 1s:''' LLLMLMMLMLLs

'''1L 4M 7s:''' LsssMsMMsMss



'''7L 2M 3s:''' LLsLLsLMLMLs

'''3L 2M 7s:''' LsMsMsLssLss



'''7L 2M 3s:''' LLsLLsLLsLMM

'''3L 2M 7s:''' LsMMssLssLss



'''7L 2M 3s:''' LLMMLsLLsLLs

'''3L 2M 7s:''' LssLssLssMMs



'''5L 6M 1s:''' LMLMLsMLMLMM

'''1L 6M 5s:''' LMsMsMMsMsMs



'''5L 6M 1s:''' LMLMLMsLMLMM

'''1L 6M 5s:''' LsMsMMsMsMsM



'''5L 6M 1s:''' LMLMLMMLMLsM

'''1L 6M 5s:''' LMsMsMsMMsMs



'''5L 6M 1s:''' LMLMLMMLMLMs

'''1L 6M 5s:''' LsMsMsMMsMsM



'''5L 6M 1s:''' LLsLMMLMMLMM

'''1L 6M 5s:''' LsMMsMMsMMss



'''5L 6M 1s:''' LLsLMLMLMMMM

'''1L 6M 5s:''' LsMsMsMMMMss



'''5L 6M 1s:''' LLMMMMLMMLLs

'''1L 6M 5s:''' LssMMMMsMMss



'''5L 6M 1s:''' LLMMMMLMLMLs

'''1L 6M 5s:''' LssMMMMsMsMs



'''5L 6M 1s:''' LLMMMMLLsLMM

'''1L 6M 5s:''' LsMMssMMMMss



'''5L 6M 1s:''' LLMMMLMLsLMM

'''1L 6M 5s:''' LsMMssMMMsMs



'''5L 6M 1s:''' LLMMMLLsLMMM

'''1L 6M 5s:''' LsMMMssMMMss



'''5L 6M 1s:''' LLMMMLLMMMLs

'''1L 6M 5s:''' LssMMMssMMMs



'''5L 6M 1s:''' LLMMLsLMMLMM

'''1L 6M 5s:''' LsMMsMMssMMs



'''5L 6M 1s:''' LLMMLsLMLMMM

'''1L 6M 5s:''' LsMsMMMssMMs



'''5L 6M 1s:''' LLMMLsLLMMMM

'''1L 6M 5s:''' LssMMMMssMMs



'''5L 6M 1s:''' LLMMLMMMMLLs

'''1L 6M 5s:''' LssMMsMMMMss



'''5L 6M 1s:''' LLMMLMMLsLMM

'''1L 6M 5s:''' LsMMssMMsMMs



'''5L 6M 1s:''' LLMMLMMLMMLs

'''1L 6M 5s:''' LssMMsMMsMMs



'''4L 6M 2s:''' LMMLsLMMLsMM

'''2L 6M 4s:''' LMMsMMsLsMMs



'''4L 6M 2s:''' LMMLMsMLMMLs

'''2L 6M 4s:''' LMsMMsLsMMsM



'''4L 6M 2s:''' LMMLMMsLMMLs

'''2L 6M 4s:''' LsMMsLsMMsMM



'''4L 6M 2s:''' LMLsMLMMMLsM

'''2L 6M 4s:''' LMsMMMsLMsMs



'''4L 6M 2s:''' LMLsLMMMMLsM

'''2L 6M 4s:''' LMsMsLsMMMMs



'''4L 6M 2s:''' LMLMsLMMMMLs

'''2L 6M 4s:''' LsMMMMsLsMsM



'''4L 6M 2s:''' LMLMsLMMMLsM

'''2L 6M 4s:''' LMsMsMLsMMMs



'''4L 6M 2s:''' LMLMsLMMMLMs

'''2L 6M 4s:''' LsMMMsMLsMsM



'''6L 4M 2s:''' LLsLMMLMLMLs

'''2L 4M 6s:''' LsMMsMsMsLss



'''6L 4M 2s:''' LLsLMLMLsLMM

'''2L 4M 6s:''' LsMMssLsMsMs



'''6L 4M 2s:''' LLsLMLMLMMLs

'''2L 4M 6s:''' LsMsMsMMsLss



'''6L 4M 2s:''' LLsLLsLMMLMM

'''2L 4M 6s:''' LsMMsMMssLss



'''6L 4M 2s:''' LLsLLsLMLMMM

'''2L 4M 6s:''' LsMsMMMssLss



'''6L 4M 2s:''' LLMMMMLLsLLs

'''2L 4M 6s:''' LssLssMMMMss



'''6L 4M 2s:''' LLMMMLMLsLLs

'''2L 4M 6s:''' LssLssMMMsMs



'''6L 4M 2s:''' LLMMLsLMMLLs

'''2L 4M 6s:''' LsMMssLssMMs



'''6L 4M 2s:''' LLMMLsLMLMLs

'''2L 4M 6s:''' LsMsMsLssMMs



'''6L 4M 2s:''' LLMMLsLLsLMM

'''2L 4M 6s:''' LsMMssMMsLss



'''6L 4M 2s:''' LLMMLMMLsLLs

'''2L 4M 6s:''' LssLssMMsMMs



'''6L 4M 2s:''' LLMMLMMLLsLs

'''2L 4M 6s:''' LsLssMMsMMss



'''6L 4M 2s:''' LLMMLLsLMMLs

'''2L 4M 6s:''' LsMMsLssMMss



'''6L 4M 2s:''' LLLsLMMLMMLs

'''2L 4M 6s:''' LsMMsMMsLsss



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMLsMLsMM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMMLMsLMs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMLsMLMsM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsLMsMLMsMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMLsLMsMM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMMLMsLsM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMLMsMLsM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsLMsMMLMsM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMLMsMLMs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMLMsMLsMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMLMsLsMM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMMLMsMLs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMLsMLMsMM / LMMsMLMsLMsM


'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMLMMsMLs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsLsMMLMsMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsLsMMLMsM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMLMsMMLs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsLsMLMsMM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMMLsLMsM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsLsMLMMsM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMMLMsMMLs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMMLsLsMM / LMMsLsLMMsMM


'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMLsMMLsM / LMMsLMsMMLMs


'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsLMsMLsMM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMMLsMLMs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsLMsMLMsM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMLMsMMLsM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsLMsLMsMM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMMLsMLsM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMMLsMLsMM / LMMsLMsLMMsM


'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsLMMsMMLs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsLsMMLsMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsLMsMMLsMM / LMMsLMMsMLsM


'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsLMMsMLMs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMLsMMLsMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsLMMsLsMM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMMLsMMLs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsLMMsLMsM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMMLsMMLsM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsMMLsMLs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsLMsLsMMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsMMLsLsM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsLsLMsMMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsMMLsLMs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsLsMLsMMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsMMLMsLs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMLsLsMMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsMLsMMLs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsLsMMMLMs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsLMsLMsMMM / LMMMsMLsMLsM


'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsMLsMLMs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsLMsMLsMMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsMLsLsMM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMMMLMsLs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsMLsLMsM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsLsMLMsMMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsMLsLMMs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsLsMMLsMMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsMLMsMLs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsLsMMMLMsM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsMLMsLsM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMLsLMsMMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsMLMsLMs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMLsMLsMMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsMLMMsLs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMMLsLsMMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsLsMMLsM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsLMsMMMLs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsLsMMLMs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMLsMMMLs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsLsMLsMM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMMMLsLMs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsLsMLMsM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMLMsMMMLs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsLsMLMMs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMMLsMMMLs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsLsLsMMM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsMMMLsLs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsLsLMsMM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMMMLsLsM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsLsLMMsM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMMMLsLsMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsLMsMMLs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsLsMMMLsM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsLMsMLsM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsLMsMMMLsM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMLsMMMLsM / LMMMsLMsMLMs


'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsLMsLsMM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMMMLsMLs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsLMsLMsM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMMMLsMLsM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsLMsLMMs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LsMLsMMLsMMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsLMMsMLs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsLsMMMLsMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsLMMsLsM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMMMLsMMLs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsLMMsLMs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LsMLsMMMLsMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LsLsMMMLsMMM / LMMMsLMMMsLs


'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMMsMMLsLs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsLsLsMMMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMMsMLsMLs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsLMsLsMMMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsLsLMsMMMM / LMMMMsMLsLsM


'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMMsMLsLMs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsLsMLsMMMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMMsMLMsLs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMLsLsMMMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsLsMMMMLs / LMMMMsLsMMLs


'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMMsLsMLsM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsLMsMMMMLs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMMsLsMLMs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMLsMMMMLs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMMsLsLsMM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMMMMLsLs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMMsLsLMsM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMMMMLsLsM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMMsLsLMMs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LsLsMMLsMMMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMMsLMsMLs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsLsMMMMLsM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMMsLMsLsM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMMMMLsMLs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LsMLsMLsMMMM / LMMMMsLMsLMs


'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMMsLMMsLs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LsLsMMMMLsMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMMMsMLsLs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsLsLsMMMMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsLsMMMMMLs / LMMMMMsLsMLs


'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMMMsLsLsM

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMsMMMMMLsLs



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMMMsLsLMs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LsLsMLsMMMMM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMMMMsLMsLs

'''3L 6M 3s:''' LsLsMMMMMLsM



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LsLsLsMMMMMM / LMMMMMMsLsLs


'''3L 6M 3s:''' LMMLsMMsLMMs / LMMLsMMLsMMs


'''5L 2M 5s:''' LMsLsLsLsMLs

'''5L 2M 5s:''' LMsLsMLsLsLs



'''5L 2M 5s:''' LMsLsLsLsLsM

'''5L 2M 5s:''' LMsMLsLsLsLs



'''5L 2M 5s:''' LsLsLsMLsLsM / LMsLsLMsLsLs


'''5L 2M 5s:''' LsLsLsLsMLsM / LMsLMsLsLsLs


'''5L 2M 5s:''' LsLsLsLsLsMM / LMMsLsLsLsLs


'''5L 4M 3s:''' LLsLsLMMMMLs

'''3L 4M 5s:''' LsLsMMMMsLss



'''5L 4M 3s:''' LLsLMMMMLsLs

'''3L 4M 5s:''' LsLssLsMMMMs



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsLsMLsLMsM / LMsLsMLMsMLs


'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsLsLsMLMsM

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsMLMsMLsLs



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsLsLMsMLsM / LMsLMsMLsLsM


'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsLMsMLMsLs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsMLsLsMLsM



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsLMsLsLMsM

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsMLsMLsLsM



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsMLsMLsLs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsLMsLsLsMM



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsMLsLsMLs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsLsLMsLsMM



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsLsLsLMsMM / LMMsMLsLsLsM


'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsMLsLsLMs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsLsLsMLsMM



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsMLsLMsLs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsLsMLsLsMM



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsMLMsLsLs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsMLsLsLsMM



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsLMsLsMMLs / LMMsLsMLsMLs


'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsLsMLsLsM

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsLsLMsMMLs



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsLsMLsLMs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsLsMLsMMLs



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsLsMLMsLs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsMLsLsMMLs



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsLsLsMMLs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsLsMMLsLs



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsLsLsMLsM

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsLMsMMLsLs



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsLsLsMLMs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsMLsMMLsLs



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsLsLsLsMM

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsMMLsLsLs



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsLsLsLMsM

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsMMLsLsLsM



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsLsLMsMLs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsLsMMLsLsM



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsLsLMsLsM

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsMMLsLsMLs



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsLsLMsLMs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LsLsMLsMLsMM



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsLMsMLsLs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsLsLsMMLsM



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsLMsLsMLs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsLsMMLsMLs



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsLMsLsLsM

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsMMLsMLsLs



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LsLsMLsMMLsM / LMMsLMsLsLMs


'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMsLMsLMsLs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LsLsMMLsMLsM



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LsLsLsMMLsMM / LMMsLMMsLsLs


'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMMsMLsLsLs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsLsLsLsMMM



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMMsLsMLsLs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsLsLsMMMLs



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMMsLsLsMLs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsLsMMMLsLs



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMMsLsLsLsM

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMsMMMLsLsLs



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMMsLsLsLMs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LsLsLsMLsMMM



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LsLsMLsLsMMM / LMMMsLsLMsLs


'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMMsLMsLsLs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LsLsLsMMMLsM



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LsLsLsLsMMMM / LMMMMsLsLsLs


'''1L 10M 1s:''' LMMMMsMMMMMM / LMMMMMMsMMMM


'''1L 10M 1s:''' LMMMsMMMMMMM / LMMMMMMMsMMM


'''1L 10M 1s:''' LMMsMMMMMMMM / LMMMMMMMMsMM


'''1L 10M 1s:''' LMsMMMMMMMMM / LMMMMMMMMMsM


'''1L 10M 1s:''' LsMMMMMMMMMM / LMMMMMMMMMMs


=== <u>Multi-Period</u> ===

'''2L 8M 2s:''' LMsMMMLMsMMM / LMMMsMLMMMsM


'''2L 8M 2s:''' LsMMMMLsMMMM / LMMMMsLMMMMs


'''6L 4M 2s:''' LLsLMMLLsLMM

'''2L 4M 6s:''' LsMMssLsMMss



'''6L 4M 2s:''' LLMMLsLLMMLs

'''2L 4M 6s:''' LssMMsLssMMs



'''4L 4M 4s:''' LsLsMMLsLsMM / LMMsLsLMMsLs


'''4L 4M 4s:''' LLsMMsLLsMMs

'''4L 4M 4s:''' LMMLssLMMLss



'''3L 6M 3s:''' LsMMLsMMLsMM / LMMsLMMsLMMs


== Conditional (MMM=LsL) ==

=== <u>Single-Period</u> ===

'''2L 9M 1s:''' LMMMMMMMMMLs


=== <u>Multi-Period</u> ===

'''4L 6M 2s:''' LMMMLsLMMMLs


== Conditional (MMM=sLs) ==

=== <u>Single-Period</u> ===

'''1L 9M 2s:''' LsMMMMMMMMMs


=== <u>Multi-Period</u> ===

'''2L 6M 4s:''' LsMMMsLsMMMs
